narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI-specific chips and related components continues to drive strong growth for semiconductor manufacturers, with Micron's recent surge highlighting the memory component of this trend.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
Micron revenue growth slows below 15%
China export controls expand to HBM

sources.title: Micron’s stock soars as UBS slaps on an out-of-sight price target
Micron hits $1 trillion market cap for the first time as stock surges 18%

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The strong demand and expanding indications for GLP-1 receptor agonists are creating a massive market opportunity for pharmaceutical companies leading in this space.
watchFor: New competitive drugs enter the market with superior efficacy/safety
Insurance coverage for GLP-1s becomes more restrictive
Unexpected long-term side effects emerge

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Increased geopolitical tensions and ongoing conflicts are leading to higher defense budgets and demand for aerospace and defense products and services.
watchFor: Major peace deals announced in current conflict zones
US defense budget cuts in next fiscal year proposal
Space launch failures impact investor sentiment

sources.title: Trump to host Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as Iran talks continue
U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
Space stocks are rocketing as SpaceX keeps making pre-IPO headlines with first Starship launch

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Demand Boost
narratives.thesis: Increasing cyber threats and the need to secure expanding digital footprints, including AI infrastructure, continue to drive robust demand for cybersecurity solutions.
watchFor: Major cybersecurity breaches lead to government regulation that favors incumbents
Corporate IT spending surveys show a significant cut to security budgets
Increased competition from hyperscalers offering integrated security solutions

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Large internet platforms continue to dominate digital advertising and content consumption, benefiting from network effects and AI-driven personalization.
watchFor: Significant regulatory action impacting ad targeting
User engagement declines across major platforms
Increased competition from new short-form video platforms

narratives.name: Discount Stores Resilience
narratives.thesis: Consumers continue to favor discount retailers for essential goods, providing a stable demand environment for these companies.
watchFor: Unexpected decline in same-store sales for major discount retailers
Significant increase in promotional activity impacting margins
Consumer shift to premium brands as economic conditions improve

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Gold continues to act as a hedge against inflation and geopolitical uncertainty, with recent PPI data suggesting persistent inflationary pressures.
watchFor: Fed signals aggressive rate hikes
Real yields turn significantly positive
Strong disinflationary data

sources.title: PPI for final demand advances 1.4% in April; services rise 1.2%, goods increase 2.0%

narratives.name: Computer Hardware AI Integration
narratives.thesis: The integration of AI capabilities into consumer electronics and enterprise hardware is creating new demand cycles, particularly for companies like Apple that are expected to benefit from on-device AI.
watchFor: Apple's WWDC fails to deliver compelling AI features
Consumer spending on premium AI-enabled devices disappoints
Dell's server demand slows unexpectedly

sources.title: Bank of America says a shift in AI is playing into Apple's hands. And the stock should benefit

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Strong consumer spending and robust payment volumes continue to benefit credit card networks and payment processors, despite broader economic concerns.
watchFor: Consumer credit card delinquencies spike unexpectedly
Significant slowdown in retail sales impacting payment volumes
New regulations on interchange fees

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud solutions, driving demand for platforms that enable AI development and deployment, though some early movers are seeing a temporary pause.
watchFor: Major cloud providers report decelerating AI-related revenue
Palantir's next earnings guidance disappoints
Enterprise software spending surveys show significant contraction

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Expansion
narratives.thesis: Streaming services are expanding their content libraries and exploring new formats to attract and retain subscribers, but competition remains fierce.
watchFor: Netflix or Disney+ report subscriber losses
Content production costs continue to escalate without commensurate revenue growth
New entrants disrupt the streaming landscape

narratives.name: Silver Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Silver's dual role as a precious metal and industrial commodity makes its price sensitive to both inflation expectations and global manufacturing activity.
watchFor: Global manufacturing PMI drops significantly
Strong industrial demand for solar panels or EVs weakens
Gold-silver ratio widens substantially

narratives.name: Internet Retail Innovation
narratives.thesis: Innovation in e-commerce, particularly with AI-driven tools, is creating new opportunities for online retailers to enhance efficiency and customer experience.
watchFor: AI agent adoption in e-commerce fails to show ROI
Significant slowdown in online retail sales growth
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI in consumer applications

sources.title: StoreClaw Wins Product Hunt “Product of the Week” with AI Agents Built to Execute, Not Just Advise

narratives.name: Capital Markets Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Investment banking and asset management firms are navigating a period of moderate deal activity and market volatility, with some firms facing specific legal resolutions.
watchFor: Significant increase in M&A activity
Unexpected market downturn impacting asset valuations
Further legal or regulatory actions against major firms

sources.title: Goldman Sachs 1MDB Deal Clarifies Settlement Costs And Valuation Picture

narratives.name: Utilities - Independent Power Producers Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Independent power producers, especially those focused on new energy technologies, are gaining attention as the energy transition progresses.
watchFor: Delays or cost overruns in new power plant construction
Changes in energy policy unfavorable to independent producers
Technological setbacks in advanced energy solutions

narratives.name: Other Industrial Metals & Mining Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The market for critical industrial metals, particularly rare earths, is sensitive to geopolitical factors and technological demand.
watchFor: Escalation of trade tensions impacting rare earth supply
Significant shift in demand for technologies using rare earths
New mining projects come online, increasing supply

Technology.thesis: The AI infrastructure buildout continues to be the dominant theme, driving strong performance in semiconductors and related hardware. Software adoption for AI is also gaining traction, though some areas are seeing a pause after significant rallies.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
China expands export controls to advanced AI chips/equipment
Significant slowdown in enterprise software spending beyond current expectations

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer discretionary spending remains selective. While some areas like internet retail are seeing innovation, broader retail and auto sectors face headwinds from inflation and potential economic slowdowns.
watchFor: Consumer confidence index drops below 90
Retail sales data shows consistent month-over-month declines
Unemployment rate rises above 4.5%

Communication Services.thesis: The sector is navigating shifts in content consumption and advertising. While digital content remains strong, traditional entertainment faces challenges, and new internet platforms are emerging.
watchFor: Major streaming service subscriber growth turns negative
Digital advertising spending slows significantly
New social media platforms fail to monetize user base

Industrials.thesis: Geopolitical tensions are boosting defense spending, while the broader industrial sector faces mixed signals from global trade and manufacturing activity. Space-related industries are gaining momentum.
watchFor: De-escalation of major geopolitical conflicts reduces defense budgets
Global manufacturing PMI drops below 50 for two consecutive months
Major supply chain disruptions impact industrial production

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity drug wave continues to drive significant excitement and investment, while other areas of healthcare maintain steady demand.
watchFor: Unexpected negative clinical trial results for a leading GLP-1 drug
Increased regulatory scrutiny or pricing pressure on GLP-1s
Major healthcare policy changes impacting drug manufacturers or insurers

Financials.thesis: The financial sector is navigating a complex interest rate environment and evolving regulatory landscape. Credit services remain robust, but banks face potential headwinds from inflation and economic uncertainty.
watchFor: Fed signals sustained higher-for-longer interest rates impacting loan demand
Significant increase in loan defaults across consumer or commercial segments
New financial regulations that restrict bank profitability

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Discount stores and essential goods providers continue to show resilience as consumers prioritize value amidst inflationary pressures.
watchFor: Significant drop in consumer staples spending
Increased competition from online retailers impacting brick-and-mortar discount stores
Inflationary pressures ease significantly, shifting consumer behavior towards discretionary items

Utilities.thesis: The utilities sector is seeing a push towards renewable energy and independent power production, but traditional utilities face challenges from rising input costs and regulatory environments.
watchFor: Significant policy changes impacting renewable energy incentives
Sharp increase in natural gas or other fuel prices
Interest rate hikes making capital-intensive projects more expensive

Basic Materials.thesis: Demand for industrial metals and mining is influenced by global economic activity and supply chain dynamics, with specific focus on critical materials.
watchFor: Global manufacturing slowdown impacts industrial metal demand
New discoveries or increased production capacity for rare earth elements
Trade disputes affecting raw material supply chains

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are reacting to inflation concerns and central bank policy, with gold acting as a hedge against geopolitical instability and inflation, while silver tracks industrial demand.
watchFor: Core CPI print below 0.2% MoM for two consecutive months
Significant strengthening of the US Dollar (DXY > 105)
De-escalation of major geopolitical conflicts
